# Typewriter
Typing and deleting copy for hero lines, taglines, and product loops.
## Import
```tsx
import { Typewriter } from "@/components/ui/typewriter";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Typewriter words="websites" typingSpeed={90} deletingSpeed={45} pauseTime={1600} />
```
## Props
- **words** (string) — default: `"websites"`: Words
- **typingSpeed** (number) — default: `90`: Typing speed
- **deletingSpeed** (number) — default: `45`: Deleting speed
- **pauseTime** (number) — default: `1600`: Pause time
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add typewriter
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/typewriter
```
